response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, including MCP and RAG-related work at re:cinq, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his background leans more toward software engineering and AI-agent tooling rather than deep production-grade GenAI systems or vector databases. His lack of explicit GenAI-specific roles or experience with LLM optimization metrics may impact his immediate fit.
strengths: Strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, including MCP and workflow automation tools.
Proven leadership in engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, DevOps) and mentoring teams.
Extensive experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure via AWS CDK) and multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Python, D, etc.).
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in production GenAI systems.
No clear evidence of hands-on AI solution deployment or LLM performance optimization.
Background is more software engineering-focused rather than specialized GenAI engineering.
